questionHtml:
The volume of a sample of gas measured at 27 °C is 10.0 dm3. What is the temperature when the volume is reduced to 9.0 dm3 at the same pressure?

 

A.   −3.0 °C

B.   24.3 °C

C.   29.7 °C

D.   57.0 °C
